meta.name: SEO
meta.description: Per-article slug, keywords, and meta description with optional auto-fill on publish.

enabled.title: Enable SEO auto-fill
enabled.description: When off, slug, keywords, and description are not auto-generated on publish.

autoSlug.title: Auto-generate URL slug
autoSlug.description: Create a slug from the title when slug is empty.

autoDescription.title: Auto-generate meta description
autoDescription.description: Use summary first, otherwise excerpt from body when description is empty.

autoKeywords.title: Auto-generate keywords
autoKeywords.description: Use title and tag names when keywords are empty.

descriptionMaxLength.title: Description max length
descriptionMaxLength.description: Max characters when excerpting from body (80–320).

descriptionSuffix.title: Description truncation suffix
descriptionSuffix.description: Appended when text exceeds max length, e.g. …
